title: strychnos atlantica
intro: Strychnos atlantica is a plant species found in tropical regions of West Africa, belonging to the Loganiaceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis. The health benefits of Strychnos atlantica include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to be effective in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Strychnos atlantica are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
